items.title: Communion
items.author: JD Vance
items.synopsis_short: The vice president and author of…
items.synopsis_full: The vice president and author of “Hillbilly Elegy” describes how he perceives his faith played a part in his work in public life. Read by the author. 7 hours, 50 minutes unabridged.

items.title: Suicidal Empathy
items.author: Gad Saad
items.synopsis_full: The host of the podcast “The Saad Truth” argues that what he considers misguided compassion is having a negative impact on society. Read by the author. 8 hours, 23 minutes unabridged.

items.title: Big Jim Believes
items.author: Dav Pilkey
items.synopsis_full: The 14th book in the Dog Man series. The Space Cuties From Space return and discover the city has changed.

items.title: The Let Them Theory
items.author: Mel Robbins
items.synopsis_full: Read by the author. 10 hours, 38 minutes unabridged.

items.title: The Anxious Generation
items.author: Jonathan Haidt
items.synopsis_short: A look at the mental health…
items.synopsis_full: A look at the mental health impacts that a phone-based life has on children. Read by Sean Pratt and the author. 10 hours, 33 minutes unabridged.

items.title: El cuerpo lleva la cuenta
items.author: Bessel van der Kolk
items.synopsis_short: How trauma affects the body and…
items.synopsis_full: How trauma affects the body and mind, and innovative treatments for recovery. Read by Sean Pratt. 16 hours, 17 minutes unabridged.

items.title: Las 48 Leyes del Poder
items.author: Robert Greene
items.synopsis_full: Read by Richard Poe. 23 hours, 6 minutes unabridged.

items.title: Extraños / Strangers. a Memoir of Marriage
items.author: Belle Burden
items.synopsis_full: Burden retraces her marriage of 20 years in search of clues to help shape her understanding about its demise and to find a way forward. Read by the author. 7 hours, 4 minutes unabridged.

items.title: Unreasonable Hospitality
items.author: Will Guidara
items.synopsis_full: Read by the author. 8 hours, 37 minutes unabridged.

items.title: Hábitos atómicos. Edición Especial / Atomic Habits
items.author: James Clear
items.synopsis_full: Read by the author. 5 hours, 35 minutes unabridged.
